title: Migrate consoleRunWorker GraphQL/OpenAI credentials to IAM + Secrets Manager
description:
## Summary
Stop using API-key-based GraphQL auth and remove OpenAI API key from Lambda env vars for `consoleRunWorker`.

## Scope
- Replace AppSync API key usage with IAM-auth request signing where applicable.
- Remove OpenAI API key from Lambda environment variables.
- Read OpenAI key from `plexus/production/config` secret at runtime.
- Keep one canonical auth/credential path (no fallback credential modes).

## Done
- No GraphQL API key dependency in `consoleRunWorker` production path.
- No OpenAI API key in Lambda env configuration for this worker.
- Runtime retrieves required key from Secrets Manager.
- Changes merged and deployed to develop.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Starting implementation. First step: create feature branch from develop, then inspect consoleRunWorker GraphQL auth + OpenAI credential wiring to remove env/API-key usage in production path.

comments.author: derek
comments.text:
Implemented consoleRunWorker credential cleanup on `feature/plx-c884b5-console-worker-iam-secrets`.

Code changes:
- Cloud Lambda `app.py` now uses AppSync IAM auth via `PLEXUS_GRAPHQL_AUTH_MODE=iam` and creates `PlexusDashboardClient` without an API key.
- Cloud Lambda bootstraps provider credentials from `PLEXUS_CONFIG_SECRET_NAME` using Secrets Manager, setting `OPENAI_API_KEY` in-process from `openai-api-key` and optional `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` from `anthropic-api-key`.
- Amplify worker resource no longer injects `PLEXUS_API_KEY`, `OPENAI_API_KEY`, or `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` as Lambda environment variables.
- Worker resource now injects `PLEXUS_CONFIG_SECRET_NAME` and grants read access to that secret.
- Backend now maps `main` to `production` through existing environment mapping for secret name resolution.
- Added `requests-aws4auth` to root dependencies so the existing dashboard client IAM auth path is available in the worker image.
- Cleaned up the reported CodeQL `py/unnecessary-lambda` test findings.

Validation completed:
- Console worker Python tests: 15 passed.
- Dashboard typecheck: passed.
- `rcql --lang python -q -v --files "dashboard/amplify/functions/consoleRunWorker/*.py"`: passed with no reported findings.
- `poetry check --lock`: exit 0 with existing Poetry metadata deprecation warnings only.
- `git diff --check`: passed.
- `py_compile` for changed Python files: passed.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Follow-up CI fix: changed consoleRunWorker app.py to require PLEXUS_GRAPHQL_AUTH_MODE=iam from the Lambda environment instead of mutating os.environ at runtime. This keeps the production path strict and prevents IAM auth mode from leaking into unrelated Python tests. Validation: targeted consoleRunWorker pytest passed (16 tests), app_test plus dashboard client regression guard passed (11 tests), rcql over consoleRunWorker Python files passed with no findings, git diff --check passed.
